name: Dhokra Tribal Figurine
description: Exquisite Dhokra art figurine handcrafted by tribal artisans. This piece depicts a traditional figure holding a lamp, featuring intricate wire-work details.

name: Authentic Bankura Horse
description: The world-famous Bankura Horse, a symbol of Indian terracotta handicraft. Intricately carved neck and ears with deep burnt-orange hue.

name: Royal Maharaja Armchair
description: Luxurious Maharaja armchair handcrafted from seasoned teak wood. Features elaborate carvings, lion-head motifs, and premium velvet upholstery.

name: Minimalist Coffee Table
description: A sleek, contemporary minimalist side table designed for modern living spaces. Clean lines and a natural oak finish.

name: Dhokra Tribal Wall Panel
description: A stunning wall-mounted piece featuring multiple Dhokra figurines set against a dark rustic wood background.

name: Terracotta Ganesha Plaque
description: Hand-molded terracotta plaque of Lord Ganesha in a rustic earth finish. Perfect for traditional home entrances.

name: Intricately Carved Wardrobe
description: A massive royal wardrobe featuring 'jali' work and deep floral relief carvings. A heritage piece for grand interiors.

name: Solid Wood Dining Chair
description: Standard high-back dining chair made of durable Sheesham wood. Ergonomic design with a polished walnut finish.
